query: Rivian Greg Revelle appointed Chief Customer Officer date January 2026 background customer experience role

Overall less coherent and includes potentially misleading tangential info.
reasoning: Both sets confirm the core facts (Jan 12, 2026 appointment, CCO title, prior roles at Kohl's, Best Buy, AutoNation, Expedia, Revatek founder, Cars.com board seat, oversight of customer journey/go-to-market).
